|desc=Skuntank was used in both of Jupiter's battles against Barry, defeating him on the first attempt but ending up damaged on the second. It proved to be a highly efficient battler on both occasions.

Skuntank's known moves are {{m|Smokescreen}}, {{m|Night Slash}}, and {{m|Flamethrower}}.}}
